active_sprint.name: Sprint 05 — LA API restaurant pipeline
goals: Ingest the LA restaurant API with dlt and model it through staging, intermediate, and final dbt outputs

phase_log.result: Environment verified with venv/bin tools. SCRUM-5 requirements drafted from Confluence and awaiting requirements approved.

history.name: Sprint 01 — Staging Data
goals: Create 5 staging models from 3 source types (MSSQL, seed CSV, S3)

phase_log.result: schema.yml + sources.yml + ACTIVE_ASSUMPTIONS.md generated. 5 assumptions logged. BLOCKER: DuckDB MSSQL extension does not exist (A1).
Requirements updated on Confluence (v2). Seed data now 2 columns (restaurant_id, review). A3 resolved. All 5 assumptions resolved. schema.yml updated.
5 staging SQL models + seed CSV created. All columns match schema.yml exactly.
dbt compile OK. dbt seed OK (3 rows). dbt run OK (5 models). dbt test PASS 21/21. 0 errors.
DAG syntax validated. Flow: dlt_ingest >> dbt_seed >> dbt_transform (Cosmos).
